title: AI Engineer
experience_requirement: 5+ years across the software development lifecycle and 1+ year with generative AI or LLM solutions
job_description:
1. Develop AI applications that improve federal workflows and decision support.
2. Build prototypes and proofs of concept for generative AI use cases.
3. Create agentic workflows with planning, tool use, and task orchestration.
4. Implement retrieval-augmented generation and vector-database integration.
5. Connect AI services through REST APIs and cloud platforms.
6. Add observability, guardrails, security, and human-review controls.
7. Evaluate model quality, reliability, risk, and operational performance.
8. Package and deploy applications using Docker and CI/CD practices.
9. Collaborate with federal stakeholders, architects, and software teams.
10. Use Python, JavaScript, and modern agent-orchestration frameworks.
11. Bring five or more years of software development lifecycle experience.
12. Demonstrate at least one year of hands-on generative AI or LLM work.
company_details:
Chickasaw Nation Industries is a holding company with subsidiaries providing technology, infrastructure, health, and professional services to federal and commercial customers.
Company profits support programs and services for Chickasaw Nation citizens, linking its government-contracting work to a broader community mission.
